reviews.comment:
Muy mala atención de parte de algunos playeros, nunca funciona YPF en ruta y Auto despacho, la Full cierra muy temprano, es la única estación de la ciudad que cobra el aire, únicamente en efectivo (merece denuncia) y te limitan 4 minutos a pesar que uno paga. Por ser ACA y estar en el centro debería tener mejor servicio. La estación del Pipo es la mejor y a 5 minutos de distancia.

(Translated by Google)
Very poor service from some of the attendants, the YPF pumps on the highway and the drive-thru are never working, the Full station closes very early, it's the only station in the city that charges for air (only accepting cash, which is outrageous), and they limit your gas usage to 4 minutes even after you pay. Being an ACA station and located downtown, it should have better service. The Pipo station is the best and only 5 minutes away.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6208441069977197261/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2t4eVRGTjFabHBVYzBOM2NsRktjM2d6YjNkaVpsRRAB

reviews.comment:
Faaah que onda los playeros ???? Le piden permiso a un pie para mover el otro. Y encima no toman en cuenta el orden de llegada... Tardo menos yendo al pipo.

(Translated by Google)
Wow, what's up with beachgoers? They ask one foot for permission before moving the other. And on top of that, they don't take into account the order of arrival... It takes me less time going to Pipo.
